name: The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
address: C/o, Royal Embassy of Saudi Arabia, 30 Charles Street, London, W1J 5DZ

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Saudi Arabia
payments.summary: International visit to Saudi Arabia between 11 October 2025 and 14 October 2025 — Part of a delegation of MPs and Peers over four days, to meet several Saudi Ministers, royal family members and members of the Shura Council, in relation to trade, defence, tourism (Haj/Umrah), education and energy. A dinner was hosted by the Ambassodor at the British Embassy, to promote Saudi-British relations.
payments.description: Flights (£7,276.54), accommodation (£1,880.31), lunch and dinner across four days (£400 estimated)

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Saudi Arabia
payments.summary: International visit to Saudi Arabia between 11 October 2025 and 14 October 2025 — Led a delegation of MPs and Peers over 4 days, to meet several Saudi Ministers, royal family members and members of the Shura Council, in relation to: trade, defence, tourism (Haj/Umrah), education and energy. A dinner was hosted at the British Embassy with the Ambassador to promote Saudi-British relations.

payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Saudi Arabia
payments.summary: International visit to Saudi Arabia between 11 October 2025 and 15 October 2025 — To further the aims of the APPG on Saudi Arabia, to strengthen bilateral relations, promote cultural exchange, and address key issues such as trade and regional stability via discussions, visits, and events to deepen mutual cooperation.
payments.description: Flights from London to Riyadh (£7,276.54), hotel accommodation (£1,880.31) and food (£300)
